name: codex-theme-hub
description: Discover, stage, switch, and restore verified Codex themes through a conversational workflow.

interface.shortDescription: Install verified Codex themes with recovery built in.
interface.longDescription: Use natural language to validate, stage, install, switch, and restore themes from the Codex Theme Hub catalog. Theme packages stay in managed storage instead of the browser Downloads folder.
defaultPrompt: 安装并应用我在 Codex Theme Hub 选择的主题。
把 Codex 换成一个低眩光深色主题。
恢复到我上一个使用的 Codex 主题。
